items.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone HIGOS-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0  (0 in Tropical Storm).
items.body: From 22/06/2026 to 23/06/2026, a Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 93 km/h) HIGOS-26 was active in NWPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: Northern Mariana Islands (vulnerability Medium). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0  (0 in tropical storm).
